name: wikipedia-encyclopedia-research
description: Use encyclopedic evidence for named concepts, people, places, works, and scientific terms.
instructions: Use this skill when the term looks like an encyclopedic topic. Start with wiki_search when Wikipedia is enabled. Use the wiki snippet or extract only if it matches the subtitle sense. If the term needs a Chinese conventional name and Wikipedia evidence is English-only or ambiguous, continue with search_web. If the page is about the wrong sense, do not force the result into RAG.

resources.name: wiki-strategy
resources.description: When Wikipedia is enough and when web search is still required.
